findings.summary: Hallucinated Gemini model ID (gemini-2.5-flash-preview-05-20) caused 15x 404 errors on skin vision batch
findings.proposed_fix: Run client.models.list() before first google-genai API call in any batch script

findings.summary: Sent 91 images to Gemini 3.1 Pro for per-image scoring — €60 for marginal improvement over €2 Flash run
findings.proposed_fix: Flash for batch screening >10 images, Pro only for 2-3 ambiguous cases. Probe 3 images first.

findings.summary: India/Nepal photos attributed to user were brother Alex's shared album — produced invalid boom-bust finding
findings.evidence: User: 'India/Nepal/ -- that was my brother not me -- alex?'
findings.proposed_fix: Always join Google Photos sidecar metadata (people, geo) BEFORE analysis. Flag geographic anomalies.

findings.summary: GPT-5.4 dispatched twice on 83K tokens, returned empty both times, no error diagnosis between retries
findings.proposed_fix: Check exit code + output size after llmx dispatch. Diagnose before retry.

findings.summary: Regex posture extraction 90%+ false positives ('lean' matched environmental leaning), reported count as finding before spot-checking
findings.evidence: Top findings show guitar/cat/wall leaning, not body composition
findings.proposed_fix: Spot-check 5-10 top regex matches before reporting. Flag categories with >50% FP rate.
